title: Lophosoria pruinata
taxonomy: Lophosoria pruinata is classified as a species within the family Lophosoriaceae and order Polypodiales. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants that includes ferns. This species is further grouped into the family Lophosoriaceae, a family of ferns that are native to tropical regions. The genus Lophosoria is part of the subfamily Dryniodeae, which contains species with various leaf shapes and sizes. Lophosoria pruinata is a unique species within this classification, known for its distinctive characteristics.
uses: Lophosoria pruinata, also known as the rattan palm, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits.
